---
title: "About"
image: eportfolio_landing_page.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alex-meehan-267875208
---


---
title: "About Me"
---

Hi, I'm Alexander, an MSc Business Analytics candidate at Dublin City University 
with a background in Economics and Politics from University College Dublin.

I'm passionate about bridging the gap between complex data and real-world business 
strategy. My academic journey has equipped me with hands-on experience in Python, 
SQL, and machine learning, which I've applied to projects like predicting demand 
and streamlining supply chain operations for SMEs through interactive dashboards 
and data-driven insights.

During my master's dissertation, I served as project lead on an applied consultancy 
project, coordinating a team, delivering analytical recommendations, and building 
tools that translated messy datasets into clear, actionable decisions for 
stakeholders.

Beyond the numbers, I've built a solid foundation in customer-facing and leadership 
roles, from managing sales and client relationships at Geoghegan's Menswear to 
running the social media presence of UCD's Politics & International Relations Society.

Outside of work and study, you'll find me on the rugby pitch with Navan RFC or 
representing Bhulf Tón CLG.

I'm available for opportunities from May **2026** — feel free to 
 connect with me on  [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/alexander-meehan-267875208).

You might like to look at 
my projects [projects](projects/)
